codeReview.summary: The fix adds a stripping loop for non-heritable default properties on body styles, matching Python's simplify_styles behavior. The change is minimal (10 lines), well-commented, and correctly addresses the root cause: Go's body styles were only stripped against heritableDefaultProperties but Python's pipeline also strips non-heritable defaults (box-sizing: content-box, margin: 0, etc.) via inherited_properties.update(non_heritable_default_properties). The fix is placed after the existing heritable-defaults stripping loop and before font-family special-case handling, which is the correct position.

summary: Clean fix for HG .class_s790 extra box-sizing: content-box. The root cause was that body styles were only stripped against heritable default properties, but Python's simplify_styles also merges non-heritable defaults into inherited_properties before stripping. The fix adds a parallel stripping loop for nonHeritableDefaultProperties on body styles at the correct position in the pipeline. HG diff count improved from 50→48, no regressions on other test files, test suite unchanged at 10 baseline failures. The implementation is minimal, well-documented, and correctly mirrors the Python behavior.
